title: アオハル杯1戦目・オーマイガー！

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Everyone ran their very hearts out, but we still
didn't make it...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Maybe I wasn't cheerin' hard enough?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All righty, I'mma practice so my cheers are extra
loud an' happy next time!
